summary: Iteration 105: Frontend Testing - Tab Key Navigation and Ctrl+S Save in Transaction Form. All NEW features tested and working correctly.

minor.issue: Some resource returning 404 (non-blocking, appears to be favicon or similar)

critical_code_review_comments: TransactionFormDialog.jsx: enterNav handler correctly handles both Enter and Tab keys (line 38)
Tab navigation follows same FIELD_ORDER as Enter: Date->Category->Amount->Desc->Ref->RoundOff->Save
Ctrl+S useEffect listener properly attached when dialog isOpen (lines 85-95)
formRef.requestSubmit() correctly triggers form submission on Ctrl+S
RoundOffInput.jsx correctly passes onKeyDown prop to Input component
handleCategoryKeyDown properly distinguishes between suggestion selection and field navigation
seed_data_creation: Test transactions created during testing: TabCtrlSTest (₹777), CtrlSTestParty (₹555, ₹999) - partial cleanup done
context_for_next_testing_agent: v40.0.0 Tab navigation and Ctrl+S features fully tested and working. Tab follows same field order as Enter. Ctrl+S saves transaction from any field in the form. Category suggestion dropdown behavior verified: ArrowDown+Enter selects suggestion (stays on field), Enter/Tab without selection navigates to next field.

tab_key_navigation_date_to_category.details: Pressing Tab on Date field moves focus to Category field

tab_key_navigation_category_to_amount.details: Pressing Tab on Category field (without suggestion selected) moves focus to Amount field

tab_key_navigation_amount_to_description.details: Pressing Tab on Amount field moves focus to Description field

tab_key_navigation_description_to_refere.details: Pressing Tab on Description field moves focus to Reference field

tab_key_navigation_reference_to_roundoff.details: Pressing Tab on Reference field moves focus to Round Off field

tab_key_navigation_roundoff_to_save.details: Pressing Tab on Round Off field moves focus to Save button

ctrl_s_saves_transaction.details: Ctrl+S from any field (tested from Description) saves the transaction and closes dialog

ctrl_s_shows_success_toast.details: Transaction save ho gayi! toast message displayed after Ctrl+S save

enter_key_navigation_still_works.details: Enter key navigation continues to work: Date->Category->Amount->Desc->Ref->RoundOff->Save

category_suggestion_arrowdown_enter.details: ArrowDown highlights suggestion, Enter selects it (does NOT navigate to next field)

category_enter_without_suggestion.details: Enter without highlighted suggestion navigates to Amount field

form_no_submit_on_enter_in_fields.details: Form does NOT submit when pressing Enter on input fields (only submits on Save button)

form_submits_on_enter_on_save_button.details: Form submits correctly when Enter is pressed on Save button

cashbook_transactions_list_loads.details: Cash Book transactions list loads correctly and displays all transactions

console_warnings: Warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - Minor accessibility warning, not blocking
Failed to load resource: 404 - Some resource not found (non-blocking)
